## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build SystemCare.sln -c Release` is **0 warnings / 0 errors**
- [ ] `dotnet test SystemCare.sln` passes
- [ ] Matches the existing code style and design-system resources
- [ ] Added/updated unit tests for new pure logic (if applicable)
- [ ] Screenshots included for any UI change (below)
- [ ] No network calls / telemetry introduced
